name: tax-rate-lookup-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Look up US sales tax rates by state and zip code, calculating tax amounts for specified order totals.
author: genpark

state_code.description: 2-letter US State Code (e.g. CA, NY, TX).

zip_code.description: Optional ZIP code to refine rate.

tax_rate_pct.description: Applicable sales tax rate in percentage.

tax_amount.description: Calculated sales tax amount in USD.
